# VYRE Archive Boundary

This directory is cold storage, not an execution plan and not product
documentation.

Material belongs here only when it is preserved for historical context after
the live source of truth has moved elsewhere. Active audits live in
`audits/`. Contributor-facing documentation lives in `docs/`. Current
implementation plans live in the active issue or gate document that references
them directly.

Archive entries must keep their original paths intact enough to explain what
they were, but new work must not be started from this tree. If archived content
becomes relevant again, migrate the needed facts into the live source of truth
and update the code or tests in the same change.
